settings.heading: What is hydrogen water and how does it work?

settings.text: Hydrogen water is regular water infused with extra molecular hydrogen gas for added health benefits. Drinking hydrogen water from a hydrogen water bottle can help reduce oxidative stress, improve recovery, boost energy, and support overall wellness — making it one of the best water for the human body.

settings.heading: Which Dr. Water filter should I choose?

settings.text:
• TruFilter Pro (RO + UV): for maximum purification, “I want the cleanest water possible,” plus hot/ambient on-demand.
  • TruGlass: for people who want glass + minerals + great taste with a more lifestyle feel.

Orders typically ship fast (often within a day) and arrive in a 2 business days depending on location. We're proud to have the best delivery times!
PPB = parts per billion. It’s how we measure how much dissolved hydrogen (H₂) is in your water after a cycle. Higher PPB = stronger hydrogenation.

settings.heading: How strong is Dr. Water hydrogen — and what’s the difference between products?

settings.text:
Here’s the simple breakdown:

  • HydroTumbler: up to ~3000 PPB in ~10 minutes (portable, rechargeable)
  • HydroPitcher: up to ~1500 PPB in ~10 minutes (family-size, countertop plug-in)
  • Hydrator Pro: Flagship 5.14PPM Hydrogen Water Bottle

Pick Tumbler for daily carry + gym + travel.

settings.heading: How long does hydrogen stay in the water?

settings.text: Hydrogen is light — it escapes fast. For the best experience, drink it within 15–30 minutes of the cycle finishing. Keep it sealed to slow the fade.

settings.heading: What kind of water gives the best results?

settings.text: Hydrogen water is regular water infused with extra molecular hydrogen gas for added health benefits. Drinking hydrogen water from a hydrogen water bottle can help reduce oxidative stress, improve recovery, boost energy, and support overall wellness — making it one of the best water for the human body.

settings.heading: Can I add electrolytes, lemon, flavor drops, or supplements?

settings.text: Not during hydrogenation. Add-ons can interfere with the system and leave residue. If you want flavors/supplements: hydrogenate first → pour into a separate cup → add your mix.

At Dr. Water, we believe in creating a healthier planet, one product at a time. As a company that sells hydrogen water products globally, we are conscious of our environmental impact and are committed to reducing our carbon footprint in every possible way. Our mission is not just to hydrate but to do so sustainably.

We take responsibility for the environmental impact of our activities. We ensure the delivery is 100% Carbon Neutral, which means that every item you purchase contributes to a healthier planet. Here’s how we achieve this:

  1. Quarterly Carbon Footprint Calculation: We track and calculate our carbon emissions every quarter. This includes emissions generated due to deliveries across the world.
  2. Carbon Offset Initiatives: We offset this through two primary strategies:
  3. Tree Planting Projects: For every shipment made, we invest in planting trees to absorb CO2 and restore natural habitats.
  4. Green Energy Investments: We support renewable energy projects that contribute to a cleaner, sustainable future, helping reduce global reliance on fossil fuels.

For every product purchased, we calculate the carbon footprint and automatically invest in green initiatives to balance out the emissions. Whether it’s a single bottle or a full home solution, we ensure that your purchase leaves no negative impact on the environment.
Join Us in Creating a Healthier Planet

Every time you choose our products, you’re not just investing in your own health; you’re supporting our commitment to creating a sustainable future for generations to come. Together, we can make a difference—one product and one positive action at a time.
